Piliam et Atticam plane belle se habere

quod mihi Bruti litteras, gratum
from the freedman Aegypta

Pilia and Attica are in plainly good health
That you sent Brutus' letter
valde probo rationem tuam de Tusculano
maxima est in Scapulae celebritas

Othonem, si Romae est, convenias pervelim

I thoroughly approve your reasoning about the Tusculanum

if he is in Rome
For Drusus certainly wants to sell

apud Terentiam tam gratia opus est nobis tua
